creator: itetcu@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback

1. All tabs are spaces so the port doesn't work. 2. It misses WWW line 
in pkg-descr. 3. The shar should contain only pstreams/ directory. 4. It 
misses at least a dependency on doxygen as you can see here: 
http://sce-tindy.tecnik93.com/tb-exp/index.php?action=describe_port&id=1445 
Please fix all these and submit a new shar.
